title: Assertion fault on SQL input (2)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE fuzz_t1(rootpage DOUBLE PRIMARY KEY) AS SELECT * FROM (VALUES (NULL));
CREATE TEMPORARY FUNCTION fuzz_trig_del() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN SELECT * FROM fuzz_t1;
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_trig_io INSTEAD OF DELETE ON fuzz_t1 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_t1 VALUES (0.0);
key_bug_features: Assertion fault on DELETE trigger with conflicting inserts
